Claude Code 新增 Channels 功能：Telegram、Discord 消息可直接推送到编码会话

Anthropic 为其命令行编码工具 Claude Code 推出了一项新功能 Channels（频道）。简单说，它让你在 Telegram 或 Discord 上发消息，就能直接触达正在运行的 Claude Code 会话，Claude

The ability of the Claude team to learn from things like OpenClaw and implement features like this on a daily basis is a very strong argument that, for AI-powered coding teams, a very different software development process is possible, with large strategic implications.
It’s lame that the word we chose for an important new form of currency was “tokens,” real failure of imagination.

Claude Code 终于支持 Telegram 和 Discord 了

Claude Code 更新到 v2.1.80，带了一个新功能：Claude Code Channels

现在你可以通过绑定Telegram或Discord，直接给Claude Code发消息了

- 支持发图片、文件附件，Telegram单文件50MB，Discord 25MB×10个 

- https://t.co/eg0q6WUKL5

配置也简单：装官方插件→配Bot Token→ claude --channels 启动→手机配对，5分钟搞定。

配合/loop定时任务，你可以让Claude Code每5分钟检查部署状态，有问题直接Telegram通知你。一个完整的AI监控闭环。

Claude Code 现在有三种"离开电脑也能用"的方式，容易混淆： https://t.co/VjxBO7prj0
详细介绍：https://t.co/bmM3JOO9HO

Anyone else find that they're starting to talk more and more like an LLM? I feel like I've spent so much time working with them that I take on more and more of the vocabulary that's been output by them.

I'll write X posts and think "people will think I had ChatGPT write this."
We don’t live in a democracy if our elected leaders fail to implement the will of the people

Claude Code 官方远程连接 Telegram 和 Discord 插件配置流程。

具体的操作方式 - Telegram：

创建机器人：
在 Telegram 中打开 BotFather，创建后复制他给你的 Token

安装插件：
/plugin install telegram@claude-plugins-official

配置 Token：
/telegram:configure <token>

使用命令启动： https://t.co/ZRI57xlTr0

完了，最重要的限制没写：必须使用 Claude 登录，不支持使用 API 和环境变量。

这他妈的还得用我的 Skills 啊。

最重要的限制：必须使用 Claude 登录，不支持使用 API 和环境变量。

这他妈的还得用我的 Skills 啊。

I read a few dozen pages of this and it is not bad for LLM fiction, but also very very LLM-y, from the themes to the fact that there are lots of staccato conversations and meaningful silences and overwrought metaphors and very little differentiated character development.
Like this is not good. https://t.co/3Z9fIxGnUh

My experience so far with LLM fiction writing is that it takes advantage of our assumption that an author is writing things for a reason, so we are charitable to a book's quirks & do mental work to assign them real meaning. But the AI doesn't have a reason, its just bad writing.

So we take AI's weird metaphors and, because we are good readers, assume they must be there for a reason, so we figure out how to make them meaningful in our heads. But they aren't meaningful, they are nonsense, and the AI is just stealing our processing power to cover its flaws.

I like this guy

「一个人说了什么」，只是他意图的一种模糊显现。

「一个人（在何场景）说了什么」，让其意图更加清晰了。

现在读书时，如果对某一观点感兴趣，会和AI 请教当时的社会背景和文化思潮，作者说这句话，是在抵着什么东西而发言。

注意力：在有限带宽约束下，通过竞争性加权选择机制，将处理资源分配给信息子集的过程。

- LLM 有 注意力（softmax 归一化）

- 人有注意力（非注意盲视）：时间管理是注意力管理的二阶代理。

- 公司有注意力（预算争夺）：战略即注意力配置

- 国家有注意力（议题排挤）：注意力配置权就是主权。
I keep hearing that AI art has no soul. I disagree. If AI art ever made you feel something, I’d love to see it.
